📡 ALL-IN-One IPTV

The ultimate free, auto-updated IPTV playlist aggregator. 60+ sources combined, deduplicated, and verified daily.

📥 Download Playlists

🌍

Combined by Country

Complete playlist with ALL channels grouped by country. Includes every collected stream.


⬇ Download .m3u
✅

Verified Alive

Only channels with verified working links. Zero dead URLs. Updated daily via health checks.


⬇ Download .m3u

📺 How to Use

  1. Copy the playlist URL — Click "Copy URL" on the playlist you want
  2. Open your IPTV player — TiviMate, IPTV Smarters, VLC, Kodi, etc.
  3. Paste the URL — Add it as an M3U playlist source
  4. Enjoy! — Browse channels grouped by country

🚀 Features

🔄 Auto-Updated Daily

GitHub Actions fetches and combines all playlists every day. Always fresh.

✅ Link Verification

Parallel health checks ensure the "Verified" playlist has zero dead links.

🌍 Country Grouping

Channels auto-grouped by country for easy browsing.

🔗 Smart Deduplication

Same channel from multiple sources? Folded into one entry with fallback URLs.

🍪 Cookie Preservation

Channels with cookies/tokens are never removed during deduplication.

🔒 Encrypted Input

Add your private playlists using AES-256 encryption via Google Colab.

📱 Supported Players

These M3U playlists work with ANY standard IPTV player:

TiviMate IPTV Smarters VLC Media Player Kodi GSE Smart IPTV OTT Navigator Perfect Player MX Player Televizo MyIPTV Player

🏗️ Full Ecosystem

📱

Flutter Player

Cross-platform player with Netflix-like VOD and OTT-like Live TV. Supports Android, Windows, Linux.

View on GitHub →
🛡️

Proxy Optimizer

Android background service that intercepts dead streams and routes to working fallbacks instantly.

View on GitHub →
🌐

Web Player

Browser-based player with HLS.js streaming. No installation needed.

Launch Web Player →
⚠️ Legal Disclaimer: This project does NOT host, store, or distribute any IPTV streams. We only aggregate publicly available M3U playlist URLs from open-source repositories. All content belongs to their respective owners. This tool is for educational and research purposes only. Read Full Disclaimer →
